summary_en: 1.4M shares (2.32% of S/O) to be acquired for up to ¥7.0B and cancelled. Acquisition window 2026-05-15 to 2027-03-24 via ToSTNeT-3 and open-market purchase on TSE. Cancellation effective 2027-03-31.
title_en: Notice Regarding Decision of Matters Related to Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Cancellation of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief: On 14 May 2026, Kaneka Corporation's board of directors resolved to acquire and subsequently cancel treasury stock. The program will acquire up to 1.4 million ordinary shares (2.32% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum total of ¥7.0 billion during the period from 15 May 2026 to 24 March 2027. Acquisition will be executed via open-market purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, including ToSTNeT-3 off-hours transactions. All acquired shares are scheduled for cancellation effective 31 March 2027. The stated rationale is to enhance shareholder value and execute flexible capital policy in response to changes in the operating environment.
